mapper.select: SELECT TBR.ID, TBR.POST_ID, TBR.REPLY_CONTENT, TBR.REPLY_CREATED_AT, TBM.ID AS MEMBER_ID, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME, COUNT(TBRL.ID) AS LIKE_COUNT, MAX(CASE WHEN TBRL.MEMBER_ID = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS IS_LIKED FROM TBL_REPLY TBR JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBR.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID LEFT JOIN TBL_REPLY_LIKE TBRL ON TBR.ID = TBRL.REPLY_ID WHERE TBR.POST_ID = 20 GROUP BY TBR.ID, TBR.POST_ID, TBR.REPLY_CONTENT, TBR.REPLY_CREATED_AT, TBM.ID, TBM.MEMBER_NICKNAME ORDER BY TBR.REPLY_CREATED_AT DESC
